chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 189 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 26 & 27 2. For orders on CMA No.4179/2024 3. For hearing of main case 09.03.2026 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel the questions before the court had already been decided against the applicant department by virtue of Division Bench judgment of this court in the case of New Era Fabrics vs. Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue reported as 2025 PTD 1519. He seeks that this reference application may be dismissed. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
